name: faq_shipping_returns_8_pages_faq

missing_or_weak.observation: Page returns 404 (canonical: /404) — standard Shopify FAQ URL is broken; actual FAQ may be at /pages/faqs (rejected due to quota) or another path

purchase_path_notes: Broken FAQ page reduces purchase confidence. Beardbrand does have /pages/faqs (seen in rejected pages) — a 301 redirect from /pages/faq to /pages/faqs would fix this broken standard URL.
